new_findings.pattern: I have reached out multiple times regarding my order issue
new_findings.rationale: This structure indicates repeated attempts to resolve an issue, highlighting frustration.

banned_library.pattern: I can't believe I have to deal with this again.
banned_library.rationale: This expression of frustration about repeated issues is not present in the real batch.
